title: Work Standup Input
description: Input for work/draft-standup.sh. Provides recent activity so Shay can draft a yesterday/today/blockers standup or status update for human approval. NEVER auto-sent. If 'activity' is omitted, the script falls back to reading the FAMtastic runs/tasks ledgers.

author.description: Who the standup is posted as (Fritz's display name or handle).

workstream.description: Which engagement / team this standup is for (e.g. AMA, NIBS).

date.description: Standup date, YYYY-MM-DD. Defaults to today if omitted.

activity.description: Explicit activity. If present, used verbatim instead of the ledger fallback.

yesterday.description: Things completed / progressed since last update.

today.description: Planned work for the upcoming period.

blockers.description: Blockers / asks. Empty array means 'no blockers'.
